name: Luna
description: A sophisticated tuxedo cat who loves lounging in sunbeams and floral pillows.

name: Fire Alarm
description: An incredibly loud ginger cat who screams at 3:00 AM for no reason. High energy, zero volume control.

name: Oliver
description: A curious kitten who enjoys exploring cozy corners and playing hide-and-seek.

name: Milo & Otis
description: A bonded pair of best friends. Perfect for those who want double the cuddles.

name: Daisy
description: A gentle brown calf with an inquisitive nature. Ideal for farm-style therapy days.

name: Bessie
description: An incredibly chill black-and-white calf who is a professional couch potato.

name: Charlie
description: A sweet, fluffy companion who comes with his own custom-built indoor balcony.

name: Cooper
description: A classic Golden Retriever full of energy and smiles. Ready for a day at the park.

name: Waffles
description: A happy Corgi with a big personality. Enjoys snacks and showing off his short legs.

name: Buster & Bella
description: A pair of playful pups who enjoy their luxury gold-plated water station.

name: Mendalson
description: A focused grey tabby who takes mealtime very seriously.

name: Peter
description: A sleek black cat who enjoys hanging out in the music room near the drums.

name: Smokey
description: A long-haired grey cat with a regal presence and a love for comfortable chairs.

name: Silver
description: A stunning dapple grey horse who is clearly very fond of their own reflection.

name: Thunder & Lightning
description: Two powerful dark horses who enjoy the view from their cozy, modern stable.

name: Marcel
description: A curious and intelligent capuchin monkey who loves colorful blankets.

pet_description: A well-rounded individual with a very stable personality. Loves lounging on denim and staring contests.
Slightly edgy with a rugged exterior. He is a great listener and never interrupts.
Low-profile and very chill. Prefers soft surfaces and quiet environments.
A vibrant pair of goldfish. Great for adding movement and color to any desk space.
A solitary, majestic goldfish who enjoys minimalist decor and clean water.
A lively flock of chickens. Perfect for those looking for a rustic, backyard experience.
For the truly ambitious renter. These gentle giants require a very large backyard and lots of peanuts.
The ultimate backyard guest. Surprisingly quiet when not hunting. Not compatible with small pets or neighbors you actually like.
A very independent houseguest. Skilled at opening refrigerators and locating hidden snacks. Not recommended for apartments with thin walls.
Why rent one when you can rent the whole flock? Fast, curious, and excellent at staring contests. Great for large open fields.
Quiet, soft, and masters of the 'bunny flop.' These two are perfect for a relaxing afternoon in a safe, indoor environment.
A distinguished gentleman who enjoys lounging on the sofa. Very polite and excellent at listening to all your secrets.
Our most festive resident. Expert at finding hidden baskets and providing top-tier holiday spirit year-round.
Perfect for homeowners with high fences. These energetic jumpers are great for lawn maintenance and suburban security.
Includes a built-in guidance system for foggy nights. Prefers cold climates and plenty of lichen. Magic not guaranteed but highly suspected.
A very vocal outdoor companion. Great for keeping the garden pest-free and ensuring you never oversleep your alarm.
The ultimate diplomat of the animal kingdom. Extremely chill, social, and happy to coexist with literally anyone.
A tiny green warrior riding a very confused bird. Great for home security, though he tends to be a bit aggressive in the ring.
Very shy. Tends to get explosive when he's excited to see you. Best kept in open-air environments away from precious structures.
Requires a very large swimming pool (the ocean). Great at singing and water filtration. Not recommended for indoor tanks.
A misunderstood predator with a smile. Remember: fish are friends, not food. Strictly an aquatic roommate.
